title: galeopsis canescens
intro: Galeopsis canescens, also known as grey hedge nettle or Canadian fleabane, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galeopsis canescens include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Galeopsis canescens can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
